name: Spaghetti & Meat Balls by Little Joe's in La.
recipeIngredient: Ground beef, ground pork, ground veal (1 lb total)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onion, bell pepper, celery, and garlic in oil until vegetables are tender.
2. Add tomatoes, liquid, tomato puree, basil, oregano, and bay leaf; simmer.
3. Combine meat ingredients; form into 1-inch balls.
4. Fry meatballs on medium heat until lightly browned.
5. Place meatballs into the simmering sauce.
